entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop studied, including hybrid CSH 9 and local variety FSRP

entities.name: LOW NITROGEN
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by low nitrogen availability

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted, specifically semi-arid tropical India

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: The specific soil type used for growing the sorghum plants in fields and pots

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of productivity of the sorghum plants

entities.name: NITROGEN ABSORPTION
entities.description: The process and rate of nitrogen uptake by the sorghum plants

entities.name: ROOT ACTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of roots to absorb nitrogen, defined by specific absorption rate per unit root mass and length

entities.name: RELATIVE GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate of plant growth relative to its size

entities.name: RELATIVE NITROGEN ABSORPTION RATE
entities.description: The rate of nitrogen absorption relative to the plant

entities.name: SPECIFIC NITROGEN ABSORPTION RATE
entities.description: The nitrogen absorption rate per unit root mass and length

entities.name: BOOTING STAGE
entities.description: A specific growth stage of the sorghum plant

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: The stage of plant development where the grain is fully formed
